column3: "Psyllium alleviates dry skin" refers to its ability to improve the moisture level on skin by promoting a healthy balance within our bodies, making it easier for the skin to retain moisture.
"Psyllium soothes digestive issues" refers to its ability to improve gastrointestinal health by absorbing water, promoting regularity and relieving constipation.
"Psyllium relieves muscle spasms" refers to its ability to help relax tense muscles.
"Psyllium calms anxiety and depression" refers to its ability to help individuals cope better emotionally due to its fiber content that aids digestion, promoting overall mental health.
"Psyllium reduces inflammation" refers to its ability to lessen swelling and pain caused by certain health issues.
"Psyllium promotes sleep" refers to its ability to help individuals fall asleep faster or maintain a deeper sleep.
"Psyllium detoxifies the liver" refers to its ability to remove toxins and promote better functioning of this essential organ.
"Psyllium lowers cholesterol levels" refers to its ability to reduce bad cholesterol, which helps maintain a healthy heart.

"Psyllium boosts immune system" refers to its ability to enhance body's natural defense against harmful bacteria, viruses and 
        toxins.
"Psyllium prevents blood clots" refers to its ability to help regulate blood flow and reduce the risk of harmful clot formations.
